_fixture_meta.label: positive_static_transfer_fee
_fixture_meta.notes: SYNTHETIC fixture — constructed from documented Token-2022 transfer fee attack pattern (see dev.to/ohmygod article, March 2026). Represents a Token-2022 token with 9000 bps (90%) transfer fee, mutable fee authority still held by deployer, and matching rugged=true state. No real mint address because these tokens are ephemeral (live <24h before rug). Developer should replace with a real captured fixture from the test corpus once tokens with this pattern are encountered. Pattern documented: (1) token uses Token-2022 TokenzQdBNbLqP5VEhdkAS6EPFLC1PHnBqCXEpPxuEb program, (2) transferFee.pct=9000 (90%), (3) transferFeeConfigAuthority=deployer wallet (can raise to 100%), (4) no markets (never listed on DEX with meaningful buys/sells). Expected signals: sell_tax_threshold signal fires (0.90 >> 0.50 threshold). Expected confidence: sigmoid((0.90 - 0.50)/0.20) = sigmoid(2.0) = 0.88, capped contribution to weighted sum giving overall ~0.50-0.60.

risks.name: High Transfer Fee
risks.description: Token has an extremely high transfer fee of 9000 basis points (90%). Effective sell proceeds after fee would be 10% of expected value.

risks.name: Transfer Fee Authority Active
risks.description: The transfer fee authority is still held by the deployer and can raise the fee to 100% at any time.
